subcodes.title: Words to Will and Wendell Dodge, spoken on 1901-12-02
subcodes.first_line: This world is likened unto the ocean; the law and teachings of God is the ship; the mate is the covenant; the Captain is God; and the sea shore is the kingdom of Abha
subcodes.subjects: @laws of God; of the Kitab-i-Aqdas, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @the Kingdom of God [Malakut]
